message:
test(mux-server): add tiered scrollback status detection tests with FakePane harness

Add parking_lot dependency and FakePane test double implementing the
Pane trait with configurable tiered scrollback status. Add two unit
tests: compute_changes captures initial tiered scrollback snapshot,
and clearing tiered scrollback (None) is detected even without other
pane state changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,6 +23,7 @@ libc.workspace = true
 log.workspace = true
 mux.workspace = true
 portable-pty = { workspace=true, features = ["serde_support"]}
+parking_lot.workspace = true
 promise.workspace = true
 rangeset.workspace = true
 rcgen.workspace = true
